habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Keen Scent (Ex) A shark can notice creatures by scent in a 180-foot radius underwater and can detect blood in the water at ranges of up to a mile.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Keen Scent (Ex) A shark can notice creatures by scent in a 180-foot radius underwater and can detect blood in the water at ranges of up to a mile.

fullStatBlock:
CR 2
Shark
N Large animal aquatic
Init +5
Senses blindsense 30 ft., keen scent; Perception +8
AC 14, touch 10, flat-footed 13 (+1 Dex, +4 natural, -1 size)
hp 22 ((4d8+4))
Fort +7, Ref +5, Will +2
Speed swim 60 ft.
Melee Bite +5 (1d8+4 piercing)
Special Abilities Keen Scent (Ex) A shark can notice creatures by scent in a 180-foot radius underwater and can detect blood in the water at ranges of up to a mile.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 17, Dex 12, Con 13, Int 1, Wis 12, Cha 2
Base Atk +3; CMB +7; CMD 18
Feats Great Fortitude, Improved Initiative
Skills Perception +8, Swim +11
Environment  any ocean
Organization solitary, pair, school (3-6), or pack (7-13)
Treasure none
Source PFRPG Bestiary
